latestAction.text: Motion to reconsider laid on the table Agreed to without objection.

title: To direct the Secretary of Labor to support the development of pre-apprenticeship programs in the building and construction trades that serve underrepresented populations, including individuals from low income and rural census tracts.

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.

title: To require the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development to establish a program to provide housing assistance to graduate students.

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.

title: To direct the Comptroller General of the United States to submit a report to Congress on case management personnel turnover of the Federal Emergency Management Agency, and for other purposes.

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure.

title: To direct the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to establish a pilot program to use four-dimensional functional lung imaging software product to identify respiratory disorders and lung disease in veterans, and for other purposes.

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
